summary: Completed comprehensive testing of duplicate GM response bug fix. Backend API tests show all 6 duplicate bug fix scenarios passing, including scene-response endpoint accepting resolved_last_turn and last_gm_response fields, no repetition of previous actions, and proper response length limits. Frontend dashboard and all navigation sections working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/gm/scene-response accepts resolved_last_turn and last_gm_response fields
POST /api/gm/scene-response with no prior context works normally
POST /api/gm/scene-response with resolved context does NOT repeat previous actions
POST /api/gm/scene-response moves scene forward to new actions
POST /api/gm/scene-response persistent consequences mentioned briefly not replayed
POST /api/gm/scene-response response length stays under 1500 chars
Frontend navigation works across all sections
All 6 duplicate bug fix specific tests passed
